docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-24-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BILSKY, YOEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILLS, MICHELLE $300.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $300.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-24-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-24-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF YOEL BILSKY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MICHELLE MILLS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT INDICATES SHE WAS SERVED AND IS READY TO PROCEED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, ***CALLED PLAINTIFF TO CONFIRM AS TO DEFENDANT MILLS, MICHELLE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,400.00 FILED BY BILSKY, YOEL AS TO DEFENDANT MILLS, MICHELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-24-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
